brief: Tensions rise in the Strait of Hormuz as the US demands Iran stop shooting at ships, while the Justice Department subpoenas New York Times reporters over Air Force One coverage. Meanwhile, America faces an impending population bust, and a historic steam locomotive crosses the US, drawing huge crowds.
news_summary: Key stories include Iran-US tensions, DOJ subpoenas of NYT reporters, US population decline warnings, and the cross-country journey of the Big Boy steam locomotive.
papers_summary: Research highlights include a visual analytics dashboard for missing data (ImputeViz), an industrial study of AI in crime linkage, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China.

en.brief: Tensions rise in the Strait of Hormuz as the US demands Iran stop shooting at ships, while the Justice Department subpoenas New York Times reporters over Air Force One coverage. Meanwhile, America faces an impending population bust, and a historic steam locomotive crosses the US, drawing huge crowds.
en.news_summary: Key stories include Iran-US tensions, DOJ subpoenas of NYT reporters, US population decline warnings, and the cross-country journey of the Big Boy steam locomotive.
en.papers_summary: Research highlights include a visual analytics dashboard for missing data (ImputeViz), an industrial study of AI in crime linkage, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China.

zh.brief: Typhoon Bavi hits China and Taiwan causing widespread evacuations and power outages, while a German court sentences members of a Chinese-led sexual assault network.
zh.news_summary: Typhoon Bavi approaches China's Zhejiang, with hundreds of thousands evacuated; Taiwan reports 150,000 power outages as the storm brings winds of 164 km/h. Meanwhile, a German court convicts members of a cross-border sexual assault ring linked to a Telegram group called 'German Old Driver Driving School'.
zh.papers_summary: No priority Chinese research papers today.

todays_image.caption: Just as a steam locomotive harnesses raw power to conquer land, a single rower harnesses immense human endurance to conquer the sea.
todays_image.title: Steam Locomotive
